earnRateNote: Points earned per $1 spent at The Quarry (closed tab).

tiers.name: Quarry Standard
tiers.perks: Welcome to the family. Full access to the redemption ladder. 1.0× earn rate.

tiers.name: Quarry Silver
tiers.perks: 1.1× earn rate. 5% off any bottle of wine. Avg ~$100/mo to maintain.

tiers.name: Quarry Gold
tiers.perks: 1.25× earn rate. 10% off bottles. Free birthday entrée. Early event RSVPs. Avg ~$150/mo to maintain.

tiers.name: Quarry Elite
tiers.perks: 1.5× earn rate. 15% off bottles. One complimentary glass of wine per visit. Priority on private event dates. Named on the wall. Avg ~$333/mo to maintain.

tierDecay.rule: If a member has zero spend for 60 days, tier drops one level. A banner appears at day 30 saying 'Visit by [date] to keep your tier.' Points themselves never expire — only the tier perks decay.

catalog.name: $10 Off Your Bill
catalog.description: Applied to any check at the bar or kitchen.

catalog.name: Free Glass of Wine or Beer
catalog.description: House pour or any draft beer · standard pour.

catalog.name: $20 Wine Bottle Credit
catalog.description: Toward any bottle on the wine list.

catalog.name: Free Entrée + Glass of Wine
catalog.description: Any entrée up to $25 menu price + standard 6 oz house pour.

catalog.name: Free Wine Tasting Admission
catalog.description: Includes food and wine for two. Reserve any monthly tasting.

catalog.name: Free Bottle of Wine
catalog.description: Any bottle on the standard wine list (excludes reserve & vintage).

bonuses.name: Welcome Bonus
bonuses.description: First sign-in to the Quarry app.

bonuses.name: Per-Visit Bonus
bonuses.description: Just for stopping in — earn 10 pts every visit when your closed tab is $20 or more.

bonuses.name: Wine Tasting RSVP
bonuses.description: RSVP and attend a paid wine tasting event.

bonuses.name: Ticketed Event RSVP
bonuses.description: RSVP and attend any other ticketed event.

bonuses.name: Reservation Honored
bonuses.description: Show up for a confirmed dinner reservation.

bonuses.name: Birthday Month Visit
bonuses.description: First visit during your birthday month each year.

bonuses.name: Refer a Friend
bonuses.description: Both you and your friend earn when their first tab closes. Capped at 5 referrals per year.

bonuses.name: Public Review
bonuses.description: Leave a Google or Facebook review (admin verifies).

bonuses.name: Private Party Booked
bonuses.description: Book a private party of 10+ people via the app.

stipulations: Members redeem one reward per check (no stacking five rewards on one visit).
Tier bottle discounts don't combine with happy hour or wine-of-the-week pricing.
Elite 'free glass per visit' is one standard pour per check, logged by the bartender.
Birthday rewards must be redeemed in person, ID required, valid only in birthday month.
Free Entrée + Wine reward applies to entrées up to $25 menu price; wine pour is 6 oz house standard.
Tier downgrades one level on 60 days of no spend; warning shown at 30 days.
Points never expire — only tier perks decay with inactivity.
Redemption codes expire 5 minutes after generation; show to staff at the bar.
Anthropic/Quarry reserves the right to update the program. Members notified of any change.
